_description: Standing decisions log — append only. Log every architectural or process decision with reason and permanence.
_note: Never delete entries. Mark superseded decisions with status: superseded and point to successor.

decisions.decision: War room protocol adopted as standard for high-stakes architectural decisions
decisions.reason: Operation Context Lock validated that war room with domain characters produces better output than standard analysis — surfaced compound token cost problem and Delta fallback architecture not in original spec

decisions.decision: Config G Vector Memory RAG selected as context architecture
decisions.reason: Both Gemini war room (44/50) and pre-test analysis independently selected Echo. Implement after Mirofish confirms tonight.
decisions.note: Mirofish winner 80.4/100. Echo scored 56.8. Gap caused by CLAUDE.md token cost killing Echo Layer 1. RAG delivers 200 token overhead vs 2952. Hamilton fault tolerance addressed via Config B fallback when Ollama unavailable.

decisions.decision: A/B Vedic math test runs sequentially not in parallel
decisions.reason: Sequential gives clean isolated CPU and memory measurements. Parallel contaminates thermal and memory readings.

decisions.decision: CivitAI models referenced not downloaded until GPU upgrade complete
decisions.reason: HP Pavilion has integrated graphics only. SDXL requires 8GB VRAM minimum. RTX 3060 12GB upgrade required before local SD generation.
